properties.name: studio.mybatis.mapper-locations
properties.description: Default mapper XML resource locations applied when mybatis.mapper-locations is not set.

properties.name: studio.mybatis.type-aliases-package
properties.description: Default MyBatis type aliases package applied when mybatis.type-aliases-package is not set.

properties.name: studio.mybatis.type-handlers-package
properties.description: Default MyBatis type handlers package applied when mybatis.type-handlers-package is not set.

properties.name: studio.mybatis.database-id-aliases
properties.description: Database product name to MyBatis databaseId aliases used by the default VendorDatabaseIdProvider.
